title: Springy Show-off Nutty Almond Milk Chocolate Skillet
description: A show-off Uruguayan dish featuring milk chocolate cut into sashimi-like pieces in a Dutch oven. Sugar-free-friendly and nutty.
instructions: Blend almond milk and sugar-free sweetener until smooth.
Add chocolate pieces to the mixture and stir gently to coat.
Warm a Dutch oven over medium heat, ensuring it is hot enough for cooking sashimi cut items.
Arrange nut mix around the edges of the Dutch oven, leaving center open for the liquid-filled section.
Gently pour the almond milk-chocolate mixture into the center of the Dutch oven.
Reduce heat to low and let sit for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve immediately with fresh fruit or yogurt on top if desired.
